1. Click purple ring -> activates (white)

3. Click dark gray diamond at (51, 40) -> activates (white), previous goes back to dark gray

Looking at the image, I see the orange diamond at (28, 43) is still there. Maybe I need to click it again?
Or maybe I need to click the dark gray shape at (31, 45) again?

1. Click orange diamond -> moves down, creates dark gray shapes
2. Click dark gray diamond -> activates (white)
3. Click dark gray square -> activates (white), previous goes back to dark gray
4. Click ring -> activates (white), previous goes back to dark gray
5. Level complete
In the purple chain so far:
1. Click purple square -> moves down, creates dark gray shapes
2. Click dark gray diamond -> activates (white)
3. Click dark gray square -> activates (white), previous goes back to dark gray
4. Click orange diamond outline -> activates (white), previous goes back to dark gray
5. Click orange diamond at (28, 43) -> reset (wrong!)
6. Click dark gray diamond -> re-activates (white)
7. Click purple ring -> activates (white), creates new dark gray shape
8. Click dark gray shape -> activates (white), previous goes back to dark gray
9. Click dark gray diamond at (51, 40) -> activates (white), previous goes back to dark gray
So now the diamond at (51, 40) is white. The level is not complete. What's next?
Looking at the image, I see the orange diamond at (28, 43) is still there. Maybe I need to click it now?
Actually, looking at the image more carefully, I see the orange diamond at (28, 43) has a magenta center. And the purple square at (24, 51) has a magenta center.
